title: Contact | Judith Cummins
meta_description: Contact Judith Cummins about your concerns within Bradford South.
headings: h2: Contact your local Labour Councillor
text_excerpt: --> Contact | Judith Cummins top of page HOME ABOUT CONTACT Questionnaire NEWS SUBSCRIBE USEFUL LINKS How to Contact Judith I work hard to represent all constituents within Bradford South. I run regular surgeries within Bradford South, which you can request by contacting me directly. If you would like to get in contact with me, please complete the following steps: ​ 1. Check that I am your MP by clicking here ​ ​ 2. Please read our Privacy Policy by clicking here ​ ​ 3. Please use the below contact form, or contact details, to send me a message. Click here for the contact details of local Labour Party Councillors Contact Judith Cummins MP First Name Last Name Email Street Address Street Address Line 2 City Postal / Zip code Code Phone Policy Issue Choose an option Write a message I agree to the privacy policy View terms of use Submit Thank you for submitting! I will treat as confidential all personal information you have given to me or to my staff. I may need to pass on this information to others so they can help you. I undertake to handle the information you gave to me in line with the requirements of the General Data Protection Regulation and the Privacy Policy General Contact Details Email: judith.cummins.mp@parliament.uk ​ Tel (Constituency Office): +44 (0) 1274 924280 ​ Post: 26-28 Church Bank, Bradford BD1 4DZ Contact your local Labour Councillor Here you can find your local Labour Party Councillors within the constituency of Bradford South, organised by wards. To view councillors across Bradford City Council, click here. ​ To find your councillor by postcode, click here. Great Horton Councillors Councillor Joanne Dodds Telephone(Res): 01274 576624 Telephone(Bus): 01274 432276 Email: joanne.dodds@bradford.gov.uk Councillor Tariq Hussain Mobile Phone: 07812 001545 Email: cllr.tariqhussain@bradford.gov.uk Queensbury Councillors Councillor Hazel Parsan Mobile Phone: 07812 001545 Email: hazel.parsan@bradford.gov.uk Councillor Alex Mitchell Mobile Phone: 07974 865061 Email: alex.mitchell@bradford.gov.uk Royds Councillors Councillor Ruth Wood Telephone: 07970 822737 Email: ruth.wood @bradford.gov.uk Councillor Angela Tait Mobile Phone: 07582 100591 Email: angela.tait@bradford.gov.uk Councillor Andrew Thornton Telephone(Res): 01274 792201 Email: andrew.thornton@bradford.gov.uk Wibsey Councillors Councillor Ralph Berry Telephone(Res): 01274 770869 Mobile Phone: 07976 382993 Email: ralph.berry@bradford.gov.uk Councillor Sabiya Khan Mobile Phone: 07970 822756 Email: sabiya.khan@bradford.gov.uk Councillor Faiz Ilyas Mobile Phone: 07484 412629 Email: faiz.ilyas@bradford.gov.uk Wyke Councillors Councillor Sarah Ferriby Telephone(Res): 01274 674306 Email: sarah.ferriby@bradford.gov.uk Councillor Andy Walsh Mobile Phone: 07977 590678 Email: andy.walsh@bradford.gov.uk Councillor Tom Hughes Mobile Phone: 07484 412630 Email: tom.hughes@bradford.gov.uk Privacy Policy QUICK NAVIGATION Home A bout Judith Contact Judith News Campaigns Useful Links ​ STAY CONNECTED Facebook Twitter Instagram GET IN TOUCH Email: judith.cummins.mp@parliament.uk . ​ Tel (Constituency Office): +44 (0) 1274 924280 ​ Post: 26-28 Church Bank, Bradford BD1 4DZ ​ ​ Media Inquiries ​ Promoted by Andrew Thornton on behalf of Judith Cummins both at 6 Beechwood Road, Bradford BD6 3AQ. bottom of page
